title: Initialize and critique orchestration state
scope: Review the objective, deliverable, constraints, task queue, and quality gates. Identify any missing research dimensions or verification needs before the substantive workers run.
goals: Confirm that the state file captures the user request accurately.
Identify weak assumptions in the task split.
Recommend any additional tasks needed for a reliable final report.
non_goals: Do not research specific autocomplete products in depth.
Do not write the final report.
safety: Do not read tmp/, archive/, or prompt-buffer.md.
Do not edit files tagged human-written.
success_criteria: Write reports/orchestration/handoffs/T000-init-state.json with assessment, recommended task changes, and any blockers.
